REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT GREGORY GRIALOU'S MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF A REFEREE (C.C.P. SEC. 763.010(B)) IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 7, 2024. NO LATER THAT MAY 31, 2024 MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT EVIDENCE OF MS. HARRINGTON'S QUALIFICATIONS TO PERFORM THE DUTIES OF A REFEREE UNDER CCP 763.010. MOVING PARTY SHALL ALSO PROVIDE A DECLARATION OUTLINING THE TIMELINE FOR (1) THE MOVING PARTY COMPLETING ITS EFFORTS TO ASCERTAIN (A) THE IDENTITY AND (B) RESIDENCE OF PERSON TO BE SERVED BY PUBLICATION; (2) SUBMISSION OF INFORMATION REGARDING SUCH EFFORTS TO A REFEREE; (3) COMPLETION OF REFEREE'S REPORT/DECLARATION. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: VANESSA WU; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

A REFEREE, AMY HARRINGTON, IS APPOINTED TO PREPARE A REPORT PER CCP 7630.010 AT THE MOVING PARTY'S SOLE EXPENSE. Off Calendar Nov-07-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
John Sinclair, Esq. representing Cross Defendant Gordon Charles Watt via Zoom Video Conference.
Scott Emblidge, Esq. representing Cross Complainant Gregory Grialou.

The court gives the parties an opportunity to discuss and confer off the record. The court passes the matter briefly.

At the 2nd calling of the matter,

Counsel for Cross Defendant withdraws the objection to the motion.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Grialou
Off Calendar Jun-07-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT GREGORY GRIALOU NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF A REFEREE (C.C.P. SEC. 763.010(B)); DECLARATION OF GREGORY GRIALOU is GRANTED. A referee, Amy Harrington, is appointed to prepare a report per CCP 7630.010 at the moving party's sole expense. Such report may be submitted to the Court (Department 206) for review and consideration in support of application for service of summons and complaint by publication.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)

Grialou
Off Calendar Apr-25-2024 Continued To Jun-07-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT GREGORY GRIALOU'S MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF A REFEREE (C.C.P. SEC. 763.010(B)) is continued to June 7, 2024. No later that May 31, 2024 moving party to submit evidence of Ms. Harrington's qualifications to perform the duties of a referee under CCP 763.010. Moving party shall also provide a declaration outlining the timeline for (1) the moving party completing its efforts to ascertain (a) the identity and (b) residence of person to be served by publication; (2) submission of information regarding such efforts to a referee; (3) completion of referee's report/declaration.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)
